title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs, discusses the company's approach to AI-native product development and safety in the context of government intervention forcing Anthropic to pull frontier models Fable and Mythos from the market. Krieger describes how AI tooling accelerates his development workflow and defends Anthropic's safety messaging as substantive rather than promotional.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs, talks with Alex Kantrowitz about AI-native product development and safety following a government intervention that forced Anthropic to pull its frontier models Fable and Mythos from the market. The conversation matters because it pairs a working view of how AI tooling speeds development with a concrete case of regulatory action against frontier models. Krieger describes how AI tooling accelerates his own development workflow, and he defends Anthropic's safety messaging as substantive rather than promotional.
